---
name: Content Issue
about: Report an error or outdated information in existing content
title: '[CONTENT] '
labels: content
assignees: ''
---

**Page URL**
Link to the affected page.

**Issue Description**
Clear description of the error or outdated information.

**Correct Information**
What should the content say instead?

**Source/Reference**
Link to authoritative source supporting the correction (regulatory document, official guidance, etc.)
